final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing traditional Chinese ink-wash landscape painting.

Style/medium: needs a "中国传统水墨" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 宋画 landscape tradition, 元代文人画 literati painting movement, 八大山人 ink-wash expressive brushwork; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include negative space (留白) as a compositional element, must balance distant and near elements
Subject: must include a distant mountain range (远山如黛), pine trees, a thatched cottage (茅草屋), an elderly figure fishing by a stream (老者溪边垂钓)
Scene/backdrop: must include mist and clouds surrounding mountains (云雾缭绕), a stream setting
Lighting/mood: needs an ethereal, tranquil atmosphere (意境空灵悠远) — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs an ink-wash tonal direction — exact ink gradations are yours
Materials/textures: needs traditional ink-on-paper surface treatment — exact brush texture and paper absorbency is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve Eastern aesthetic principles (东方美学), must maintain appropriate negative space
Avoid:
